Appearances:
Plaintiff Donna Wong as Trustee of the Jong H. Wong is present. Represented by Donna Wong.
Attorney Susan Parkinson for the plaintiff.
Defendant Julio Villacorta is not present.

Plaintiff and Counsel released by Judge Pro Tem at 2:10pm.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Dec 14, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
